name: Sedona Spirit Boutique Hotel
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Southwestern Elegance Meets Modern Luxury.
description: Sedona Spirit Boutique Hotel is an adults-only sanctuary featuring Southwest-inspired design, a rooftop pool with panoramic red rock views, and a full-service spa. Perfect for couples seeking romance and rejuvenation.

features.title: Adults-Only Ambiance
features.description: Quiet, romantic setting exclusively for adults 21+.

features.title: Rooftop Infinity Pool
features.description: Heated pool with 360-degree red rock vistas.

features.title: Award-Winning Restaurant
features.description: New American cuisine with Southwestern influences.
